title: Change background to blue and add steam iron image

requirements.summary: Change the hero section background color to blue
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays a blue background color
Blue color is visible and replaces the current background styling

file_operations.description: Update the hero section background styling to use a blue color. Modify the gradient overlays or background color classes to display blue instead of the current background. Ensure the blue background is visible and works with the existing text content and overlay structure while maintaining readability of the hero text and CTA buttons.

requirements.summary: Add a small steam iron image positioned on the right side of the hero section
acceptanceCriteria: A steam iron image is visible in the hero section
The image is positioned on the right side
The image size is appropriately small and does not overwhelm the layout

file_operations.description: Add the generated steam iron image (frontend/public/assets/generated/steam-iron.dim_300x300.png) to the hero section layout, positioned on the right side. The image should be sized appropriately small to complement the hero content without overwhelming the layout. Implement responsive positioning to ensure the image works well across different screen sizes and does not interfere with the headline text or CTA buttons. Use appropriate CSS classes or inline styles to control size, positioning, and responsive behavior.
